strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with experience across multiple languages and paradigms (TypeScript, Node.js, D, Java, C/C++)
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP and agentic workflows at re:cinq (April 2025–Present)
Demonstrated ability to scale systems (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby) and improve performance in high-throughput environments
concerns: No documented leadership tenure at scale-ups or high-growth companies; current role at re:cinq (Staff Software Engineer) is <1 year and lacks executive scope
No fintech infrastructure experience (credit systems, real-time risk modeling, payment flows, or embedded finance) despite being a core requirement
Limited evidence of designing multi-agent AI systems in production; recent AI work appears focused on developer tooling (MCP) rather than stateful, event-driven agent frameworks
response.justification: Bogdan’s resume lacks critical depth in the core domains of the role: fintech infrastructure (credit risk, working-capital management, payment flows) and agentic AI systems in production. His recent AI work is confined to developer tooling (MCP), and his longest tenure (Optilyz) was in direct mail automation, not financial systems. While he has strong full-stack engineering credentials and has scaled systems, there is no evidence of leading a technical organization through the high-stakes, regulated, real-time decisioning required for this CTO role.
